description_long: This modern bungalow features a two-story structure with a partial third-level loft, characterized by a mix of light wood and white plaster exterior walls. The front facade includes large glass doors and windows, opening onto a private fenced garden with blossoming trees and outdoor seating. The roof is a combination of a steeply sloped shed roof and flat sections, with a rooftop terrace adorned with greenery. The side and rear views reveal a carport with a transparent roof, additional garden space, and multiple balconies with metal railings. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor living spaces, and abundant natural light through expansive windows.
description: A modern, multi-story bungalow with wood and white plaster walls, large windows, and a mix of sloped and flat roofing, surrounded by a fenced garden with blossoming trees and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, large glass doors, two stories with balconies, and a lush garden with blossoming trees.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rooftop terrace, carport with transparent roof, and side garden with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the carport, back entrance, and a more private garden area with greenery and a small patio.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals additional balconies, grouped windows, and a continuation of the garden and blossoming trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and balcony windows
